heading: Payment of annuities in goods
label: 115 Payment of annuities in goods
text: The President may, at the request of any Indian tribe, to which an annuity is payable in money, cause the same to be paid in goods, purchased as provided in .section 91 of this title
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was omitted from the Code.Section 91 of this title
CodificationR.S. § 2082 derived from , .act June 30, 1834, ch. 162, § 124 Stat. 737
